name: visual-workflows-monorepo
description: A live, animated command center for AI coding agent workflows

scripts.start: npm run build -w @visual-workflows/ui && npm run start -w @visual-workflows/bridge -- --open
scripts.serve: npm run build -w @visual-workflows/ui && npm run start -w @visual-workflows/bridge
scripts.serve:live: npm run build -w @visual-workflows/ui && npm run start -w @visual-workflows/bridge -- --watch-claude
scripts.dev: concurrently -n bridge,ui -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @visual-workflows/bridge" "npm run dev -w @visual-workflows/ui"
scripts.check:ts-version: node -e "const v=require('typescript/package.json').version; if(!v.startsWith('6.')){console.error('typescript must stay on 6.x (typescript-eslint peer range); found '+v);process.exit(1)}"
